name: union_map_value_partial
description: M3d CLAIMED: union with a map variant (map<string,int> | string) where a map value is uncoercible ({"a":1,"b":"x"}). No arm try_casts (the map value "x" is not int), so the lenient pass runs: the map arm records a MapValueParseError and returns the PARTIAL map {"a":1} (ObjectToMap, score 2) while the string arm stringifies the object (JsonToString, score 2); pick_best's scalar-vs-composite rule prefers the composite map. Native admits string-keyed map arms and reproduces this. want captured from BAML final parse.
